---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What is frustrating or missing today?

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about.

## Scope

- [ ] Backend (`server/`)
- [ ] Frontend (`web/`)
- [ ] New AI provider (see [`docs/PROVIDERS.md`](../../docs/PROVIDERS.md))
- [ ] Documentation

## Additional context

Mockups, links, or examples.
